si.t: cytochrome P450 family 2 subfamily D member 6
"cytochrome P450 family 2 subfamily D member 6", "cytochrome P450, family 2, subfamily D, polypeptide 6"
CPD6, CYP2D, CYP2D7AP, CYP2D7BP, CYP2D7P2, CYP2D8P2, CYP2DL1, P450-DB1, P450C2D

Comparative Toxicogenomics Database:1565, Ensembl:ENSG00000100197, GenAtlas:CYP2D6, GenBank:AY545216.1, GeneCard:CYP2D6, HGNC:HGNC:2625, HumanCyc Gene:HS01997, ModBase:P10635, NCBI Gene:1565, OMIM:124030, OMIM:608902, PharmVar Gene:CYP2D6, RefSeq DNA:NG_008376.4, RefSeq Protein:NP_000097, RefSeq Protein:NP_001020332, RefSeq RNA:NM_000106, RefSeq RNA:NM_001025161, UCSC Genome Browser:NM_000106, UniProtKB:Q6NWU0, UniProtKB:Q6NXU8
cytochrome P450 family 2 subfamily C member 19
cytochrome P450, family 2, subfamily C, polypeptide 19

Comparative Toxicogenomics Database:1557, Ensembl:ENSG00000165841, GenAtlas:CYP2C19, GeneCard:CYP2C19, HGNC:HGNC:2621, HumanCyc Gene:HS09293, ModBase:P33261, NCBI Gene:1557, OMIM:124020, OMIM:609535, PharmVar Gene:CYP2C19, RefSeq DNA:NG_008384, RefSeq DNA:NT_030059, RefSeq Protein:NP_000760, RefSeq RNA:NM_000769, UCSC Genome Browser:NM_000769, UniProtKB:P33261, URL:http://www.imm.ki.se/CYPalleles/cyp2c19.htm
Other:Schizophrenia, Other:Schizoaffective disorder, Other:Bipolar Disorder, Other:Psychotic Disorder
Side Effect:Uterine disorder, Side Effect:Leiomyoma, Side Effect:Endometrial Hyperplasia, Side Effect:Polyps
PK:differences in the fluvoxamine plasma level at 50 mg/day
CYP2C19 intermediate metabolizer is associated with increased response to fluoxetine in people with Major Depressive Disorder as compared to CYP2C19 normal metabolizer.
CYP2C19 ultrarapid metabolizer is associated with decreased response to paroxetine in people with Major Depressive Disorder as compared to CYP2C19 normal metabolizer.
CYP2C19 poor metabolizer is associated with decreased response to citalopram, fluoxetine, paroxetine or sertraline in people with Major Depressive Disorder as compared to CYP2C19 normal metabolizer.
CYP2C19 *1/*1 is associated with decreased exposure to lansoprazole in people with history of gastric bypass surgery.
CYP2D6 *10/*10 is associated with increased concentrations of propafenone in people with Arrhythmias, Cardiac as compared to CYP2D6 *1/*1.
CYP2D6 *10/*10 is associated with increased response to propafenone in people with Arrhythmias, Cardiac as compared to CYP2D6 *1/*1.
CYP2D6 *1/*2xN + *2/*2xN are associated with increased response to methadone in people with Opioid-Related Disorders as compared to CYP2D6 *1/*1.
CYP2D6 *41 is associated with decreased metabolism of dextromethorphan in healthy individuals.
CYP2D6*1, CYP2D6*4, CYP2D6*5, CYP2D6*9, CYP2D6*10, CYP2D6*17
CYP2D6 *1/*4 + *1/*5 + *1/*9 + *1/*10 + *4/*10 + *5/*10 + *10/*10 + *10/*17 are associated with decreased clearance of tramadol as compared to CYP2D6 *1/*1.
CYP2D6 intermediate metabolizer is associated with increased concentrations of aripiprazole in healthy individuals as compared to CYP2D6 normal metabolizer.
CYP2D6 *4/*4 + *4/*6 are associated with decreased metabolism of tramadol in healthy individuals as compared to CYP2D6 *1/*1.
